H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=95, mean=7.15, std=1.78, confidence=strong. Highest-n HEALING protocol with strong efficacy. Noticeable improvement (12/29), settle time 10 minutes (11/29). Highest YouTube reach in HEALING (30 views). AutoGluon predicts 6.86 for overstimulation — observed exceeds prediction by 0.29. Demonstrates both efficacy and discovery.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Top performer in over-stimulation — most views in HEALING and strong improvement reports. Works well during commutes and relaxation.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=51, mean=6.92, std=1.73, confidence=strong. Consistent with H-OS-L1 family pattern. Positive rate 65%. Settle time peaks at 10 minutes (10/21). YouTube views=5. AutoGluon prediction (6.86) closely matches observed (+0.06).
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Mild but consistent calming effect; very limited online audience but solid internal results.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=47, mean=7.04, std=1.68, confidence=meaningful. Strong performer approaching L1 efficacy. Noticeable improvement dominant (10/23). Settle 5-7 minutes. YouTube=8 views. AutoGluon predicts 6.86 — observed 0.18 higher. Most analytically distinct in HEALING (mean_sim=0.677).
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Good calming response, especially for sleep contexts; moderate reach compared to peers.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=67, mean=7.22, std=1.93, confidence=strong. Highest-performing anxiety protocol with 63% positive ratings. Qualitative data shows moderate-to-significant improvement with 10-minute settle time common. Listeners include self-listeners (13), clients (6), caregivers (4). AutoGluon predicts 7.84 for anxiety zone — observed slightly below. YouTube reach is minimal (7 views), suggesting strong efficacy signal with discovery gap.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Most effective anxiety protocol — listeners feel moderate to significant improvement after about 10 minutes, with the video reaching very few people despite strong results.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=48, mean=6.94, std=1.62, confidence=meaningful. Strong consistency with lowest std in anxiety family. Split listener context between therapy (4), commuting (4), and self-use (12). Positive rate 67%. AutoGluon prediction (7.84) exceeds observed by 0.9 points — model sees latent potential. YouTube views=6, lowest reach in family.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: Good relief in under 10 minutes for anxiety, but still very few views online; listeners like the balanced rhythm.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=36, mean=7.08, std=1.89, confidence=meaningful. Moderate performer in anxiety series with 61% positive. Settle time clusters at 10 minutes (10/20 responses). Higher proportion of caregivers (6) supporting others. AutoGluon predicts 7.84 — 0.76 above observed. YouTube views=4, minimal discovery.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Positive change reported after settling, used partly by caregivers supporting others; video reach remains tiny.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=43, mean=6.35, std=1.70, confidence=meaningful. Crisis protocol shows expected lower mean — listeners arrive in acute states. Significant improvement reported (8/24), settle time 5 minutes common. AutoGluon predicts highest crisis zone score (7.96) — 1.6 above observed, significant model divergence. YouTube=6 views.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Crisis protocol works for acute distress — listeners report meaningful relief fast, but discovery is extremely limited.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=33, mean=6.52, std=1.70, confidence=meaningful. Slightly higher than H-CR-L1 as expected for crisis ladder. Mixed improvement levels, settle time 10 minutes. AutoGluon predicts 7.96 (1.44 above observed). YouTube=4 views — minimal reach in crisis space.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Quick calming effect for crisis states with comfortable rhythm; few people have found this yet.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=27, mean=6.52, std=1.91, confidence=meaningful. Matches H-CR-L2 mean but higher variance. Immediate settle reported by 7/19 — rapid onset for some. AutoGluon prediction (7.96) exceeds observed by 1.44. Panel notes potential drift signal. YouTube=5 views.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Rapid calming for some in crisis, with balanced rhythm appreciated; still barely any views.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=54, mean=7.19, std=1.86, confidence=strong. Highest sleep protocol mean. Noticeable to moderate improvement (11/15). Settle 5 minutes common. YouTube=4 views. AutoGluon predicts 7.54 for sleep zone — observed slightly lower. Notable drift (sim=0.530) flagged across runs.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Effective sleep protocol with fast settling; barely any YouTube presence despite strong outcomes.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=45, mean=7.09, std=1.55, confidence=meaningful. Tightest std in sleep series — most consistent. Notable listener mix: clients (6), caregivers (5), self (4). AutoGluon prediction 7.54 exceeds observed by 0.45. Views=5.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Solid rest and recovery outcomes with balanced rhythm; low visibility online.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=28, mean=7.07, std=1.68, confidence=meaningful. Consistent with other sleep protocols despite lower n. Settle 5-8 minutes typical. AutoGluon prediction (7.54) above observed. Drift signal flagged (sim=0.611). Views=3.
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Consistent sleep support used by caregivers; minimal video exposure.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=41, mean=6.46, std=1.82, confidence=meaningful. Lower focus baseline. Slight improvement dominant. Settle at 5 minutes (7/23). Music liked (15/23). AutoGluon predicts 7.73 for focus zone — 1.27 above observed, substantial divergence. Views=5.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Focus improves modestly with longer settle time needed; very low YouTube presence.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32, mean=7.19, std=1.60, confidence=meaningful. Strong focus performer with 66% positive. Settle 10 minutes (9/17). Music neutral in some (6/17). AutoGluon prediction (7.73) matches observed closely. Views=4.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Noticeable focus gain with balanced rhythm; minimal views.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=35, mean=7.63, std=1.97, confidence=meaningful. Highest THRIVING mean despite high variance. Significant improvement (11/29), settle 10 minutes (15/29). More YouTube reach than peers (15 views). AutoGluon predicts 7.73 — observed slightly lower. Drift signal noted (sim=0.532). Panel: L2 variant could smooth variance.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Outstanding focus improvement — best in THRIVING with more visibility but still needs promotion.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=34, mean=6.74, std=1.73, confidence=meaningful. Creative flow baseline with mixed improvement (slight dominant). AutoGluon doesn't list specific CF prediction but cross-bucket shows potential. Views=2. Settle splits between immediate and 10 minutes.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Creative flow boost is modest; almost no YouTube engagement to evaluate fully.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=24, mean=6.79, std=1.41, confidence=meaningful. Tighter distribution than L1. Significant improvement reported (5/15). Highest music love (6/15 loved, 6/15 liked). AutoGluon prediction slightly below observed. Views=2.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Strong creative lift with lovely music feedback; tiny online audience.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=7.28, std=1.32, confidence=developing. Highest THRIVING mean with tightest std — outstanding consistency. Significant improvement (6/25), balanced rhythm (14/25). AutoGluon prediction slightly below observed despite low n. YouTube=7 views. Panel flags volume-specific variation potential.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Best creative outcome with tight consistency despite small sample; some views but still under-discovered.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=25, mean=7.04, std=1.34, confidence=meaningful. Solid maintenance performance with good consistency. Settle takes longer — 20 minutes (9/23). AutoGluon predicts 7.69 for maintenance — 0.65 above observed. Views=3.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Balance feel-good effect takes time to settle; very few views.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22, mean=6.68, std=2.03, confidence=meaningful. Lower mean with highest variance in maintenance. Mixed improvement reports. AutoGluon (7.69) exceeds observed by 1.01 — model sees unrealized potential. Drift (sim=0.569) flagged. Views=4.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Mixed balance results with higher variance; minimal online presence.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: n=14, mean=6.93, std=1.73, confidence=developing. Consistent with family despite low n. Highest positive rate (71%) in series. Some 'did not settle' (4/19). AutoGluon prediction (7.69) above observed. Drift flagged (sim=0.554). Views=3.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Positive balance effect despite small group — highest satisfaction rate; virtually no reach.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=39, mean=6.74, std=1.94, confidence=meaningful. Mood-energy baseline. Settle 20 minutes (6/22). AutoGluon predicts 8.23 — 1.49 above observed, highest predicted score in ensemble. Cross-bucket routing to overstim and crisis zones. Views=8.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Mood lifts moderately with longer settle; predicted to perform very well by model but underperforming visibility.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: n=25, mean=6.76, std=1.71, confidence=meaningful. Similar to L1 with slightly higher positive rate (64 vs 54%). Settle also 20 minutes. AutoGluon prediction (8.23) exceeds observed by 1.47. Cross-bucket routing to crisis and maintenance. Views=8.
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Energy improves with consistent rhythm comfort; still low views.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=6.28, std=1.74, confidence=developing. Lowest mood-energy performer. 'No effect' reports (5/25). AutoGluon predicts 8.23 — 1.95 above observed, largest divergence in TRANSFORMING. Settle 5-8 minutes. Views=4.
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed mood response with some no-effect reports; significant gap between model prediction and observed results.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=22, mean=6.36, std=2.01, confidence=meaningful. Motivation baseline with 45% positive. AutoGluon predicts 7.88 — 1.52 above observed. Notable drift (sim=0.647). Views=5.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Motivation lifts moderately but with mixed results; low discovery.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: n=14, mean=6.21, std=1.63, confidence=developing. Lowest motivation mean with extended settle (20min). AutoGluon prediction 7.88 exceeds observed by 1.67 — highest divergence in motivation family. Views=7.
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Modest motivation gain with longer settle times; minimal views.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=13, mean=7.15, std=2.38, confidence=developing. OUTLIER — highest mean despite lowest n in family. Significant subgroup effect likely. AutoGluon (7.88) close to observed despite deviation. Lowest drift in family (sim=0.507). Views=7.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Surprising strong motivation boost despite small sample; may affect specific subgroups differently.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=24, mean=6.75, std=1.62, confidence=meaningful. Mind clarity baseline. Split improvement/no-effect (10/25 vs 8/25). Settle 10 minutes (8/25 each). Views=8. AutoGluon predicts 7.54 — 0.79 above observed.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Mind clarity modestly improves; small but interested audience.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: n=16, mean=6.81, std=1.64, confidence=developing. Slight improvement over L1. Significant improvement reports (7/20). Highest rhythm satisfaction (12/20 very settling). Views=12 — best TRANSFORMING reach. AutoGluon prediction 7.54 exceeds observed.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Clearer thinking reported with excellent rhythm rating; best TRANSFORMING YouTube reach.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=10, mean=5.70, std=2.45, confidence=developing. LOWEST PROTOCOL MEAN — flagged by three analyzers. Bimodal distribution with some worsened (2/17). High variance indicates population mismatch. AutoGluon predicts 7.54 — 1.84 above observed, largest divergence. Requires design investigation. Views=8.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Lowest-scoring protocol — some listeners felt worse; needs design review; few views.

sphere_commentary.overview:
Across 1000 responses, the protocol library demonstrates solid aggregate efficacy with HEALING showing the tightest variance and TRANSFORMING the widest spread — patterns consistent with design intent.
• The crisis protocol family (H-CR-*) shows expected lower means as listeners arrive in acute states
• Over-stimulation (H-OS-L1) has both the highest n (95) and the strongest YouTube reach (30) in HEALING
• AutoGluon predicts higher scores than observed for most TRANSFORMING protocols, suggesting model overestimation
• Feature importance reveals avg_view_percentage as the strongest predictor (0.277), indicating retention strongly drives outcomes
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
The three series follow their design archetypes with notable internal variation.
• HEALING DESCENT protocols achieve consistent means 6.9-7.2 with lowest variance — rapid nervous system regulation shows reliable outcomes
• THRIVING HOLD protocols trend higher (mean 6.7-7.6) but with wider spread — cognitive optimisation is listener-dependent
• TRANSFORMING ASCENT protocols show the lowest mean (6.59) and highest std (1.87) — the ascending-arc design carries inherent variability as expected
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Several protocols deviate from expected patterns and warrant investigation.
• X-MC-L3 shows the lowest mean (5.70, n=10) with std 2.45 and bimodal distribution — potential design mismatch for this protocol variant
• T-FC-L3 has high variance (std 1.97) despite strong mean (7.63) — the model predicts 7.73 but observed exceeds prediction
• X-MD-L1 and X-MD-L2 both show substantial gaps between AutoGluon prediction (~7.9) and observed means (~6.2-6.4) — model overestimation on motivation protocols
• X-MD-L3 is an outlier in the MD family with mean 7.15 despite low n=13 — this inverted pattern within the same protocol family suggests subgroup effects
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
Signal-driven protocol refinements emerge from cross-analyzer consensus.
• H-OS-L1 (n=95, strong confidence) has highest HEALING YouTube presence (30 views) but still modest — increase adviser routing exposure for this proven performer
• T-FC-L3 (n=35, mean=7.63) shows highest THRIVING efficacy but also high variance — consider L2 variant with extended hold phase to smooth outcomes
• X-MC-L3 (n=10, mean=5.70) is flagged by three analyzers as priority redesign — investigate frequency arc parameters or extend descent phase
• X-ME-L1 shows strong AutoGluon predicted score (8.23) but observed is 6.74 — boost discovery for this high-potential protocol currently underperforming visibility
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding analysis reveals notable analytical stability patterns.
• CROSS-RUN DRIFT: X-MD-L3, H-SL-L1, and T-FC-L3 show the lowest similarity (<0.55) between earliest and latest runs — these protocols have evolving analytical framing as data accumulates
• CROSS-PROTOCOL SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: T-FC-L1 ↔ T-FC-L2 (sim=0.878), H-SL-L1 ↔ H-SL-L2 (sim=0.869), T-CF-L1 ↔ T-CF-L2 (sim=0.841) cluster consistently — these paired protocols share analytical properties
• H-OS-L3 (mean_sim=0.677) and T-FC-L3 (mean_sim=0.692) are the most analytically distinct protocols — their response patterns diverge from series norms
• Embedding data is sufficient for stability analysis across 28 protocols with multiple runs
